error_string: PostStartHook "start-service-ip-repair-controllers" failed: unable to perform initial IP and Port allocation check
secondary_errors: ipaddresses.networking.k8s.io is forbidden: not yet ready to handle request

required_files.rationale: Contains the RepairIPAddress controller that fails during startup. The 'unable to perform initial IP and Port allocation check' error originates here.
Test for the repair controller, updated in fix PR.

error_chain: RepairIPAddress controller tries to create IPAddress objects
API server rejects with 'not yet ready to handle request' (admission not ready)
trigger_conditions: Kubernetes cluster upgrade from v1.32 to v1.33
MultiCIDRServiceAllocator enabled by default in v1.33
Race between PostStartHook and API readiness during startup
